chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 309 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ قَصَّ أَظْفَارَهُ يَوْمَ اَلْخَمِيسِ وَ تَرَكَ وَاحِداً لِيَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ نَفَى اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ اَلْفَقْرَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.309 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever trims their nails on Thursday but leaves one nail to trim on Jumu’ah, Allah (swt) will remove poverty from them."
